definition.meaning: Young man attendant upon a knight; servant; peasant; later a rustic lover, suitor
definition.origin: From Old Norse sveinn "boy, servant, attendant"

definition.etymology: From PIE *swoi-no-, from root *s(w)e- "oneself, alone, apart"

definition.meaning: Attendant, servant; one's own man; relative, young man

definition.origin: Related to Old Norse sveinn; also attested as personal name Swein, Sweġen

definition.meaning: A young lover, suitor; a rustic or pastoral admirer
definition.usage: Common in pastoral poetry to denote a young man in love

definition.meaning: Boy, servant, attendant (near-fit for swain's servant meaning)
definition.note: Mac Suibhne (McSwain) is an Irish Gaelic surname sometimes confused with Swain
Primary meaning is servant/attendant, paralleling Norse sveinn

definition.meaning: Oneself, alone, apart (root of swain via "one's own man")
